item.title: Very very sneaky
item.description: Goals are knowing your partner and being known well enough for fun games like this.
item.dc:creator: StellaMatutina

item.title: Saturday WHOLESOME dump of smiles and good feelings #721
item.description:
1. Aww, that careful little bite not to hurt the kid... such a nice doggie
2. Pigeon: Yo that's my jam
3. Kitty: MINE
4. Smol pup
5. Stan Lee legit fangirling over Wolverine
6. Taking match photos with a 100 year old camera
7. All aboard the doggy bus!
8. AMAZING! Wish books would come stuff like this, I would buy so hard
9.
10. Labs and water!
11. She is a literal homewrecker!
12. Just sitting and enjoying life
13
14. The satisfying sounds of turning on game consoles :)))
5. Hello friendos, for the 20 months, I’ve been working on a game that’s very close to my heart. "Do Not Press The Button Or You'll Delete The Multiverse" is a quirky adventure crafted with love and passion by two brothers who grew up neglecting their homework and playing PC and NES games. (Legit the biggest punishment that our parents could dish out at us was not to ground us but take away the PC monitor :D ). As indie developers, we rely on your support to bring our game toa life. By adding it to your wishlist, you’re helping us reach more players and make a big impact in the gaming community. https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Yes, you can play with this dapper gentlemen right here : )
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: What Happened Today #21
item.description: Thank you, Imgur! Your notes and comments touch me, and I'm glad so many of you are finding value. We can do this together. The judiciary is (mostly) holding firm. From mass firings to court battles, Trump’s latest moves are shaking up the country. Get caught up—and take action. LINKS 1 - https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clyr2xvn4dpo 2 - https://www.cnn.com/2025/02/21/politics/trump-fires-top-us-general-cq-brown/index.html 3 - https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/feb/21/pentagon-layoffs-civilian-workers 4 - https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/us/judge-temporarily-blocks-key-parts-of-trump-s-executive-orders-targeting-dei/ar-AA1zy4yE 5 - https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5158174-trump-ice-director-deportations/ 6 - https://www.cbsnews.com/news/supreme-court-trump-special-counsel/ 7 - https://denvergazette.com/news/nation-world/judge-extends-block-on-musks-doge-from-treasury-systems/article_364172d1-8ed3-5e92-97b7-87889168d75b.html 8 - https://www.axios.com/2025/02/21/steve-bannon-cpac-nazi-salute-french-leader 9 - https://apnews.com/article/proud-boys-leader-enrique-tarrio-arrested-a1b88e26b17e21193fbf92ad0e9a65e2 10 - https://www.newsweek.com/doj-ethics-complaint-judge-ana-reyes-2034721 11 - https://www.npr.org/2025/02/21/nx-s1-5305226/ap-sues-white-house-gulf-of-america-mexico-trump 12 - https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/trump-administration/federal-judge-gives-go-ahead-trump-gut-usaid-workforce-rcna193262 Fighting Back - https://thehill.com/homenews/state-watch/5157818-trump-janet-mills-maine-transgender-athletes/

.

.

.
.

.
.
.
.
.

item.dc:creator: GirlUndone

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1280 (absolutely harmless songbird)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Did you know that in the middle ages, rowboat jousting was an actual thing?
Having someone light a cigar like this for me is now on my bucket list I guess.
If I ever do the dating profile thing again, I'll be sure to put a photo of me in my Scythian gear with the caption, "Willing to be a Steppe dad."
Also, my father, my high school bullies, some former bosses....some exes... former friends.... former enemies...
I don't wanna be on this ride anymore. Would someone from Europe or Canada PLEASE marry me and get me out of this hellhole, PRETTY, please?
I mean, they want to take our postal service from us, and I'm not talking about the emo band, either. They literally don't want us writing to one another. Or sending letters. Or cookies. They don't want you to send cookies. Write your senators and representatives.
Or slaughter them for their sins against their constituents, whatever, though for legal reasons, this sentence is totally a joke. Much like the American government.
I'd almost rather live in Skyrim right now.
Let's get into some good trouble, guys.
Me asking a coworker yesterday if she'd seen the new Star Trek and saying that I would be willing to join her if she wanted to catch up may have been responsible for everyone receiving an email re-iteration of the company's sexual harassment policy today. This makes me feel like absolute slime, so I'm just not going to talk to my female coworkers umprompted anymore and will give no personal details of likes, dislikes, or interests. I am honestly very phobic about seeming creepy and giving any sort of attention that could be seen as unwelcome, and my operating conclusion is that ANY attention from me is unwelcome. I ain't as handsome as Luigi, nor have I killed as many CEOs to be seen as attractive.
Oh shit, this meme violates those rules.
(I may be misinterpreting something else going on, but I haven't seen anything that could qualify or know of anything going on elsewhere that could qualify? But it's best to isolate myself from any coworkers I might offend by accident and unknowingly in my autistic ignorance.) There are times I wish I was asexual and aromantic. Maybe I wouldn't crave human contact so much. I could be a good little desert Hermit/monk.
Actually don't, your wife is probably going to die in childbirth at the rate this shit is falling apart.
I need a replica of one of these for my Bronze-age Wizard so bad. Also, that guy needs a name, too. I wonder what the Proto-Indo-European or Proto-germanic name for the Hoopoe was. Or the Wryneck. Both of those seem like perfectly cromulent magical birds to me.
Roman stereotypes.
Yeah. I need to do this.
I wish I could save the day by making it weird.
I don't know how me and my date are going to ride Pippin around, though, he's pretty small. Though I don't know where I'd even meet a date....
It's this one.
I don't. That's my problem. I wish I was neurotypical. I bet I'd be happier.
This would make his job easier.
Meh.
I'm trying. I'm trying. Are you?
Moooooooooosssssss
I did have a fascinating (to me, anyway) shower thought this morning, though: there's plenty of archaeological, ethnographic, and ethnobotanic evidence for the use of Agave amongst the Hisat'sinom/Southern Sinagua people here in the Verde Valley, up into the historic period, but I'm not aware of any at all amongst the ancestral and modern Pueblo populations north of Flagstaff into the Hopi mesas, and east into the Chacoan heartland. Why? Is it as simple as Agave doesn't or even can't grow on the Colorado Plateau? Or is it a lack of research? I'm now wondering.
Yeah. Exactly. God, I miss having hope we'd have a Star Trek future. Now it's just mirror universe shit.
This. This is one of the few things that keeps the fire in my soul from burning out--this, and knowing he'd be Just As Angry as I am.
Yeah, pretty much. Tell me you're into me and tell me what you want me to do, please.
When are we going to realize that we have nothing to lose by burning down this whole place ourselves, and doing it just to spite those motherfuckers? If we can't burn them, let us burn the world around us so it's useless to them. Not my ideal solution, but it has crossed my mind.
More like full of finches/canaries, but yeah.
Shrikes endorse the impalement of fascists. Be a shrike, impale a fascist today, whether literally or metaphorically.
Hi Dennis.
I honestly don't know what hope feels like anymore. I pretty much go to bed at 9pm, wake up at 6am, sleep uneasily, awake from dreams screaming with Pippin sometimes whispering "itsokay itsokay love you too" at me. What little energy I have goes to collecting a few memes a day, posting them, hoping to feed some sort of flame of resistance.
My suggestion has been redacted for gratuitous amounts of blood pouring from the ruling class.
Pippin tax. Today's message from Pippin: "Peek-a-boo! Pretty bird." Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal, and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them, and tell them they're free to message me.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Memes that made Alan Walker stop walking
item.dc:creator: Hinazumi

item.title: UK’s Jonathan Pie.
item.description:
2
Source: https://old.reddit.com/r/PublicFreakout/comments/1ivicfw/uks_jonathan_pie_completely_goes_off_on_trump_and/ --------------------------------------------------------------------- Other stories from yesterday (Imported from previous post) (I will be updating today, just haven't got there yet..) --------------------------------------------------------------------- Donald Trump Called 'Megalomaniac' By Angry Local at Republican Town Hall https://www.newsweek.com/donald-trump-georgia-town-hall-republicans-megalomaniac-2034234 GOP Rep. Rich McCormick Faces Furious Locals in Town Hall DOGE Mega Backlash https://www.thedailybeast.com/gop-rep-rich-mccormick-faces-furious-locals-in-town-hall-event-gone-wrong/ Kash Patel Says He Never Promoted QAnon. Here Are All The Times He Did https://archive.ph/td1a6#selection-553.0-553.70 83 percent of Americans disapprove of Trump’s Jan. 6 pardons: Poll https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5157765-donald-trump-jan-6-pardons-wapo-survey/ Donald Trump Polling Worse on The Economy Than Any Recent President https://www.newsweek.com/donald-trump-economy-polling-vs-recent-presidents-2033865 Trump Blows Up After Onslaught of Devastating Polls https://newrepublic.com/post/191830/trump-reaction-polls-approval Trump generously makes up an approval rating for himself, defying reality https://www.msnbc.com/rachel-maddow-show/maddowblog/trump-generously-makes-approval-rating-defying-reality-rcna193139 Bannon Does His Own Questionable Salute While Calling for a Third Trump Term https://www.thedailybeast.com/bannon-does-his-own-questionable-salute-while-calling-for-a-third-trump-term/ French leader cancels CPAC speech after Bannon's apparent Nazi salute https://www.axios.com/2025/02/21/steve-bannon-cpac-nazi-salute-french-leader Irish Leaders to Boycott St Patrick's Day Celebrations at White House https://www.newsweek.com/irish-leaders-boycott-st-patricks-day-celebrations-white-house-2034275 Trump’s attempts to denigrate Zelenskyy have led to a surge in Ukrainian unity https://apnews.com/article/ukraine-russia-trump-zelenskyy-putin-c0790f9054c6c69d698ed9aa816158ac ‘Very, Very Bad’: Ex-Government Economist Makes Bleakest Trump Prediction https://www.huffpost.com/entry/jesse-rothstein-prediction-trump-economy_n_67b84761e4b05145b9c532f7 Trump’s revolution will end badly — for himself, and for America https://thehill.com/opinion/campaign/5155580-trumps-revolution-will-end-badly-for-himself-and-for-america/ Elon Musk Hits Astronaut With Shocking Slur After Being Slammed Over ‘Lie’ https://www.thedailybeast.com/elon-musk-calls-astronaut-andreas-morgensen-fully-retarded-after-being-slammed-over-lie/ Musk and Hannity Talk Right Over Trump in Awkward Fox News Interview https://www.thedailybeast.com/musk-talks-over-trump-as-hannity-blanks-president-in-awkward-fox-interview/ Elon Musk’s ‘Cringe AF’ CPAC Stunt Is Mercilessly Mocked Online https://www.huffpost.com/entry/elon-musk-cpac-stage-stunt_n_67b8669ae4b09eb9376ff112 Ohio GOP Rep. Balderson says Trump's executive orders 'getting out of control' https://www.dispatch.com/story/news/politics/2025/02/20/trump-executive-orders-troy-balderson-ohio-congress-gop-republican/79329526007/ Staff at multiple agencies instructed not to speak to Congress, says Democrat https://thehill.com/homenews/house/5157303-congress-dems-concerns-ban-employees/ Ex-Proud Boys leader Enrique Tarrio arrested near Capitol https://thehill.com/regulation/court-battles/5158030-proud-boys-enrique-tarrio-arrested/amp/ Trump did not understand Pearl Harbor, new book reveals: ‘What’s this all about?’ https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/us-politics/trump-pearl-harbor-new-book-very-stable-genius-b2700639.html Judge again orders US to unfreeze foreign aid, stops short of contempt https://www.reuters.com/world/us/judge-again-orders-us-unfreeze-foreign-aid-stops-short-contempt-2025-02-20/ "He's not standing up": Protesters want Hakeem Jeffries to lead an aggressive opposition to Trump https://www.salon.com/2025/02/21/hes-not-standing-up-want-hakeem-jeffries-to-lead-an-aggressive-opposition-to/ Republican Senator Ripped for Promoting Measles Vaccine Amid Texas Outbreak After RFK Confirmation: 'Unfortunately You Voted for an Anti-Vaxxer' https://www.latintimes.com/republican-senator-ripped-promoting-measles-vaccine-amid-texas-outbreak-rfk-confirmation-anti-vaxxer-576283 Sanders Has a Message for Working-Class Trump Supporters: 'They're Going After You' https://www.commondreams.org/news/bernie-sanders-warning-trump-supporters MAGA's not-so-secret weapon: "Major media are a key tool for Trump’s destruction of the government" https://www.salon.com/2025/02/21/magas-not-so-secret-weapon-major-media-are-a-key-tool-for-trumps-destruction-of-the-government/ Trump again raises idea of running for an unconstitutional third term https://archive.ph/Zt13D Hunter Schafer’s Passport Gender Changed After Anti-Trans Trump Order: ‘F-ck This Administration’ https://archive.ph/ZQBSd --------------------------------------------------------------------- If there is an article that seems important but you cannot read, do not give up. Copy the title and put it in a search engine to find and alternative source that has pulled that story's text. archive.ph often allows you to put an address to the article to bypass this. To make things even simpler, there are block lists that you can add to UBlock to open these documents directly. You can use these links on PC, Mac and Android. You can drop this filter list directly into UBlock and it will allow you through (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/liamengland1/miscfilters/refs/heads/master/antipaywall.txt). This list is updated regularly, with an update just two days ago. I will provide a video that shows how to do this however, due to the compression methods here, it shows up a bit low quality but it is enough to easily figure it out. (https://imgur.com/gallery/land-of-free-to-yuh-72f1Fuq) It's recommended to use a browser other than Chrome in order to navigate. Recently, Google has been combatting against ad blockers (convenient, huh?) and from what I understand, they have removed extensions. Some on previous versions may still have access but it is only temporary and deemed unreliable on that basis. --------------------------------------------------------------------- NeatURL is an extension to help remove clutter and tracking from urls (https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/neat-url/). ClearURL is also an alternative (however I haven't tried it, it's #1 in the store) https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/clearurls/ If you're okay with manually enabling/disabling what is displayed, I recommend NoScript Security Suite to put full control into your hands. Note, it can be bothersome at first, but once you set permissions on each page that you visit frequently, you don't have to mess around with doing it over and over. Protection isn't meant to be convenient in this age, unfortunately. https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/noscript/ XCancelled will forward you to Twitter comments outside of the environment, allowing you to view information without being signed in. This is incredibly useful for news stories that contain "Tweets" so you can see their comments or download videos from their sources (with other tools) https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/nitter/ Load Reddit Images Directly does just that. Rather than clicking an image to slowly have it converted to a different format (many times unusable and needs to be converted back resulting in degradation), it will open in a new tab as .jpg https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/load-reddit-images-directly/ Chrome Mask will trick sites into thinking you're using Chrome for certain tasks. YouTube is a good example- to combat adblockers, they have limited their videos to those who they detect are using browsers that allow adblockers. There is a toggle switch for how you would like your browser to be announced. https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/chrome-mask Onetab is also useful but you can end up with tons and tons to "look over later" as I often do. https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/onetab/ Tab session manager- same as above. (I also have a hundreds here that I haven't gotten around to) https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/tab-session-manager/ For editing posts, if you do not have Photoshop, there is a browser-based alternative you can use completely for free with (practically) all of the bells and whistles. https://www.photopea.com/ If there is text on the screen and you cannot copy it, try Text-Grab. (my hotkey is alt+f) https://github.com/TheJoeFin/Text-Grab --------------------------------------------------------------------- Stay in the Fight! https://actionnetwork.org/forms/thank-you-for-taking-action-stay-in-the-fight/ Keep up with current threats: https://www.realtimefascism.com/ How far along are we to fascism? https://www.project2025.observer/ Support Ukraine! https://americancoalitionforukraine.org/ Another useful sub: https://old.reddit.com/r/Keep_Track/ Contact your representatives in Washington (yes, even if your representatives are Republicans. In fact, ESPECIALLY if they are) for any and all that concerns you. Here is a number for the Capitol switchboard, they'll patch you right through: (202)-224-3121 https://5calls.org/ On the Play store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.a5calls.android.a5calls https://generalstrikeus.com/ Litigation Tracker: Legal Challenges to Trump Administration Actions https://www.justsecurity.org/107087/tracker-legal-challenges-trump-administration-actions/ Keep an eye on the Executive Actions & Legislation. Question each one. https://potustracker.us/ How much is he golfing? https://trumpgolftrack.com/ Keep up with everything happening here: https://old.reddit.com/r/politics/ https://old.reddit.com/r/fednews/ Pardons for criminals, by criminals (ongoing): https://www.justice.gov/pardon Pardons for criminals, by criminals (1st term): https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Brought to you by: "The best people" https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook
item.dc:creator: BlasphemousJones

item.title: Caturday dump

item.title: Caturday: Lethe by Narga Lifestream
item.description:
Model: Narga Lifestream Cosplay: Lethe (Fire Emblem) https://www.instagram.com/narga_lifestream/?hl=en
For reference Lethe is one of my favorite Fire Emblem characters, so seeing a cosplay this detailed and accurate is pretty cool.
